          · -- Prove that each A_i has exactly n elements assigned 0.
            intro i
            simp [Finset.filter_insert, Finset.filter_singleton]
            <;>
            (try decide) <;>
            (try {
              fin_cases i <;> simp (config := {decide := true})
            })
      rcases h₃ with ⟨n', hn', A', B', hAB', hAcard', hAint', hB', hassign'⟩
      refine' ⟨n', hn', A', B', hAB', hAcard', hAint', hB', hassign'⟩
  rw [h_main]
  <;> rfl
